use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH METASTATIC BREAST CANCER
TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH UNRESECTABLE OR METASTATIC LIPOSARCOMA

indications.text:
1.1 Metastatic Breast Cancer
HALAVEN is indicated for the treatment of patients with metastatic breast cancer who have previously received at least two
chemotherapeutic regimens for the treatment of metastatic disease. Prior therapy should have included an anthracycline and a taxane
in either the ad...

HALAVEN is indicated for the treatment of patients with metastatic breast cancer who have
previously received at least two chemotherapeutic regimens for the treatment of metastatic
disease. Prior therapy should have included an anthracycline and a taxane in either the adjuvant or
metastatic setting.

HALAVEN is indicated for the treatment of patients with metastatic breast cancer who have
previously received at least two chemotherapeutic regimens for the treatment of metastatic
disease. Prior therapy should have included an anthracycline and a taxane in either the adjuvant or
metastatic setting.
